mapper.select: SELECT TMIU.UNIT_ID, TMIU.UNIT_NM, TMIU.UNIT_ID as id, TMIU.UNIT_NM as nm, TMIU.UNIT_DESC, TMIU.ORD_SEQ, TMIU.USE_YN, TMIU.CREATED_AT, TMIU.CREATED_BY, TMIU.UPDATED_AT, TMIU.UPDATED_BY FROM ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO_UNIT TMIU WHERE 1=1 AND TMIU.COMP_ID = #{compId} ORDER BY TMIU.USE_YN DESC, TMIU.ORD_SEQ ASC, TMIU.CREATED_AT ASC

SELECT #{compId} AS COMP_ID, TMIU.UNIT_NM, TMIU.UNIT_ID as id, TMIU.UNIT_NM as nm, TMIU.UNIT_DESC, TMIU.ORD_SEQ, TMIU.USE_YN FROM DATASET.TB_DATASET_MSDS_INFO_UNIT TMIU WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY TMIU.USE_YN DESC, TMIU.ORD_SEQ ASC, TMIU.UNIT_NM
mapper.insert:
select case when #{unitId} is null or #{unitId} = '' then to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((coalesce(max(substring(unit_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') else #{unitId} end as unitId from esg.tb_msds_info_unit where unit_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' and comp_id = #{compId}
INSERT INTO ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO_UNIT ( UNIT_ID, UNIT_NM, UNIT_DESC, COMP_ID, ORD_SEQ, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{unitId}, #{unitNm}, #{unitDesc}, #{compId}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT TMIU.UNIT_ID, TMIU.UNIT_NM, TMIU.UNIT_DESC, TMIU.UNIT_ID as id, TMIU.UNIT_NM as nm, TMIU.ORD_SEQ, TMIU.USE_YN, TMIU.CREATED_AT, TMIU.CREATED_BY, TMIU.UPDATED_AT, TMIU.UPDATED_BY FROM ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO_UNIT TMIU WHERE 1=1 AND TMIU.UNIT_ID = #{unitId} AND comp_id = #{compId}
